name: Integration with The Retail Score
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can gain competitive advantage through advanced retail analytics by integrating "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " with The Retail Score, a business intelligence solution that brings your retail data to life with instant access to critical insights including point-in-time stock history and live performance dashboards. This helps optimize your retail operations by enabling data-driven decision making across inventory planning, pricing strategies, customer analytics, and store performance management."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Implementing The Retail Score integration provides hundreds of pre-configured retail metrics and powerful analysis capabilities through web-based dashboards and Excel integration. When you configure this solution, you can expect better visibility into key retail KPIs, automated reporting distributed to stakeholders, multi-calendar support that reflects your business cycles, seamless integration of data from multiple sources including budgets and payroll, and powerful visualization options that turn insights into actions driving bottom-line performance improvements."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppQIREA2.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppQIREA2.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (46).jpeg"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Retail Score is a business intelligence and retail analytics solution that integrates into Retail Express and gives you a competitive edge by bringing your data to life."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Get instant access to the insights that are critical to omni-channel success, including "}, {"text": "point-in-time stock history", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "live performance dashboards", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Publish performance insights at Head Office and Store level via a web-based Portal"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enable power users to run deep analysis in Excel - slice and dice the data any way you choose"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Visualise data using Multiple calendars that reflect the way you run the business"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Automated reporting and distribution to key business users"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pre-configured calculations across 1000's of retail measures including Stock position back through time"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Seamlessly pull data in from other sources including Sales & Product Budgets, Payroll, digital marketing e-com channels and Time & Attendance"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Output critical data to existing business intelligence platforms such as Power BI and Tableau"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Turn insights into actions that drive KPI's and dramatically improve your bottom-line performance."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": intimately understand the KPI's that retailers rely on"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Hundreds of pre-determined metrics are available ?out of the box? and more can be configured to support your particular needs"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Retail Score's centralised data warehouse provides an end-to-end view of your business, from Inventory Planning, Allocation & Replenishment to Store scorecards, Pricing and Promotion strategies, Customer Analytics and more"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children":
